note: Pins the exact mock requests/responses the protected tests exercise. Shapes and status codes come from the official docs; concrete handles and fixture values are deterministic mock pins.

query.requestId: UUID from the injected generator, one per submission

submit.omitted_fields_rule: unset optional fields (timeout 0, empty context strings) must be absent from the JSON body

results.inline_rule: the data array of the 200 submit response IS partition 0; it must never be fetched again

partition_fetch.order_rule: partitions 1..N-1 are fetched strictly in ascending order, exactly once each

results.value_rule: every value stays the exact string the server sent (byte-exact, unicode preserved); SQL NULL is JSON null and must surface as Value{Valid:false}
results.count_rule: each partition's row count must equal partitionInfo[i].rowCount and the concatenated total must equal numRows; any mismatch is an error naming the partition index

expired_handle_404.meaning: the statement handle is unknown or its results have expired
expired_handle_404.client_rule: return HandleExpiredError{StatementHandle, Partition} and STOP: no retry, no further partition requests

errors.token_rule: the bearer token must never appear in any error text
